title: Forge change .forge.yaml
description: Per-change metadata declared in .forge/changes/<name>/.forge.yaml. Validated by .forge/scripts/validate-change-yaml.sh and the verify.sh 'Change YAML Schema' gate (F.2).

name.description: Change name slug. Starts with lowercase letter; lowercase letters / digits / dots / dashes only. No underscores, no uppercase.

status.description: Change pipeline phase. Each phase has a corresponding /forge:<verb> command.

created.description: ISO 8601 date when the change was opened (matches timeline.proposed).

schema.description: Archetype this change targets. Drift detector in f2.test.sh ensures this enum stays in sync with .forge/schemas/*/schema.yaml on disk.

constitution_version.description: Constitution version under which this change was ratified. Stays at the version current at proposal time, even if the change creates a later version (ADR-006 of d5-governance).

timeline.description: Per-phase timestamps. Coherence with status is enforced by validate-change-yaml.sh post-schema rules (FR-YS-008, FR-YS-009).

layers.description: b1-workflow extension: declares the layers this change spans (full-stack-monorepo only). Shape-only validation; cross-layer semantic checks live in validate-foundations.sh.

designs_per_layer.description: b1-workflow extension: maps layer-id to design filename when the change spans multiple layers.

tasks_per_layer.description: b1-workflow extension: maps layer-id to tasks filename when the change spans multiple layers.

parent_audit_items.description: Historical extended field (b1-* / g1 / c1 / a7 / b5 changes): list of audit roadmap items this change addresses (e.g. ['B.1', 'G.1']).

depends_on.description: Historical extended field: list of prior change names this one depends on (informational).

archived_to.description: Historical extended field (b1-foundations/scaffolder/workflow): list of destination paths (typically `.forge/specs/<name>.md`) where the change's delta requirements were merged at archive time.

schema_promotion.description: Historical extended field (b1-scaffolder): records a schema_version promotion at archive time.

promotes_schema.description: Historical extended field (b1-delivery): variant of schema_promotion.
